data.title: ETH price jumps to $3,432 on ETF inflows and institutional adoption, with a 20% weekly surge. Analysts foresee $3,500 as zkEVM is integrated.
data.description: The price of Ethereum surged to $3,432, experiencing a 20% weekly increase driven by inflows from ETFs and growing institutional adoption. Analysts expect the momentum to continue, with predictions indicating the price could reach $3,500 next, especially with the integration of zkEVM technology.

data.title: Three bills in Congress aim to regulate cryptocurrency industry. One bill close to becoming law.
data.description: This week, the House considered three bills aimed at creating a national system for overseeing the cryptocurrency sector. Among them, one bill is on the verge of passing Congress to be enacted as law.

data.title: Everlight Solar wins Gold in 2025 Minnesota's Best Awards for Solar Energy Provider, showcasing commitment to excellence.
data.description: In July 17, 2025, in Brooklyn Park, Everlight Solar was awarded the Gold Winner for Solar Energy Provider in the 2025 Minnesota's Best Awards. This prestigious award highlights the company's dedication to providing top-tier solar services.

data.title: Market structure bill passed by US House in crypto week. 1 of 3 GOP bills approved with bipartisan support amid Dems' pushback on corruption allegations.
data.description: One out of three bills regarding Republicans' plans for cryptocurrency was successfully passed with bipartisan backing, despite facing criticism from Democrats who raised concerns about corruption and conflicts of interest.
Fed's Bostic: Rate cuts might be difficult in the short run - WSJ.

data.title: Sevan earns 12th Great Place to Work® cert and places on ENR's 2025 lists, ranked No. 45 in Program Mgmt and No. 71 in Construction Mgmt.
data.description: Sevan Multi-Site Solutions, Inc., based in Downers Grove, Illinois, has been acknowledged as a top workplace and listed on Engineering News-Record’s 2025 rankings for Program and Construction Management Firms. This is the company's 12th consecutive year receiving the Great Place to Work certification and its 8th consecutive year securing a place on ENR’s national lists. Sevan attained the No. 45 position in the Top 50 Program Management Firms and ranked No. 71 in the Construction Management/PM-for-Fee category.

data.title: Investment bank Evalla Advisors appoints Veersen Ghatge as managing director and Robert Pickering as senior leader to expand capabilities.
data.description: Los Angeles, July 17, 2025 - Evalla Advisors, a prominent investment bank specializing in the marketing and technology service sector, announced the appointment of Veersen Ghatge as the managing director and Robert Pickering as the senior member of its leadership team. Ghatge will be taking on the key role of managing director, overseeing strategic initiatives. Meanwhile, Pickering joins as a senior member to enhance the leadership team with his expertise. This move is expected to further strengthen the firm's position in the industry.

data.title: EICI launches Infrastructure Academy Regional Training Facility in Pittsburgh for energy workers.
data.description: The IART Facility is set to offer essential skill development and resilience training to new and existing workers in the Energy, Utility, Digital/AI, and other Critical Infrastructure sectors. Situated in Pittsburgh, the facility's inauguration took place on July 17, 2025. This initiative aims to address the growing need for training within these industries by providing specialized programs to enhance workforce capabilities.

data.title: XRP hits all-time high above $3.40; Bitcoin at $119,899.47, Ethereum at $3,448.23. Transaction volume and active addresses drop. Traders liquidation at $478.04M.
data.description: In today's cryptocurrency market, XRP has surged to a new record high above $3.40. The current prices for top cryptocurrencies are as follows: Bitcoin at $119,899.47, Ethereum at $3,448.23, Solana at $175.23, XRP at $3.36, Dogecoin at $0.2150, and Shiba Inu at $0.00001428. Notable data indicates a decrease of 18.2% in large transaction volume and a 4% drop in daily active addresses. Transactions exceeding $100,000 have decreased from 12,730 to 11,451 in a day. Exchange netflows have fallen by 125.9%. Coinglass data shows that 142,675 traders were liquidated in the past 24 hours, totaling $478.04 million. Top gainers in the last 24 hours include Flare, Curve DAO Token, and Fartcoin. Recent developments include Ripple Co-Founder Chris Larsen's significant XRP transfers worth $344 million, questions about whether El Salvador is fabricating its Bitcoin growth, and GameSquare Shares' decline following a $70 million public offering. More information is available on reputable financial news platforms.

data.title: Q2 2025 witnesses a 24% surge in crypto market cap, driven by decentralized exchanges amid falling centralized trading.
data.description: In the second quarter of 2025, the cryptocurrency market experienced a positive turnaround, showing a significant 24% rise in market capitalization. Decentralized exchanges particularly stood out during this period, experiencing remarkable growth while centralized trading volumes continued to decline.

data.title: Grand opening for Saddlewood at Joshua Ranch on July 19, with 3 floor plans, 2,554 to 3,191 sq ft, 3-5 bedrooms. Only 2 homes left.
data.description: In Palmdale, California, City Ventures, the state's top developer of eco-friendly homes, has revealed that Saddlewood, their latest community in Joshua Ranch, will launch its model homes on Saturday, July 19th. The development features three floor plans ranging from 2,554 to 3,191 square feet, with three to five bedrooms, up to three-and-a-half bathrooms, and two to three-car garages. This provides buyers with a range of options for new single-family homes.
